infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: GetCollab needs camera access so you can capture profile photos and campaign content.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: GetCollab needs photo library access so you can upload images for your profile and campaigns.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: GetCollab needs permission to save photos to your library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: GetCollab needs microphone access for video content creation.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: GetCollab uses your location to surface relevant campaigns in your area.

plugins.photosPermission: GetCollab needs access to your photos to upload images.
plugins.cameraPermission: GetCollab needs access to your camera to take photos.
